225 G0110D1_WLK_CRDR_SELF_CD G0110D1_WLK_CRDR_SELF_CD G0110D1 ADL Assistance: Walk In Corridor Self Performance Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's self-performance ability to walk in the corridor. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Independent - no help or staff oversight at any time
